Designed and built an end-to-end ML system to predict optimal adaptive bitrate (ABR) configurations for live video streams on Charter's Spectrum TV platform serving 15M+ subscribers. Problem: Rule-based ABR algorithms react poorly to sudden network congestion, causing rebuffering and degraded QoE during peak hours — especially during live sports with unpredictable viewership spikes. Solution: Built a lightweight LSTM-based model ingesting per-session telemetry (throughput, buffer occupancy, segment download times, RTT, CMTS utilization) to predict next 5-second network throughput with 89% accuracy. Model runs inference in under 8ms on edge nodes (Lambda@Edge), meeting hard latency constraints for real-time ABR decisions. Training pipeline processes 3TB+ of session telemetry daily on Spark (EMR), with 60+ engineered features. Distributed PyTorch training across 4 GPU instances, with Optuna for hyperparameter tuning and MLflow for experiment tracking. Deployed a shadow-mode A/B testing framework with Bayesian significance testing to validate predictions against the existing rule-based system before full rollout. Results: - 34% reduction in rebuffer events during peak hours across top 50 congested nodes - 12% improvement in average delivered video bitrate - 19% reduction in session abandonment during live sporting events - Serves 8M+ predictions/hour at p99 latency of 6.2ms Stack: PyTorch, LSTM, Spark, AWS (SageMaker, EMR, Lambda@Edge, S3, Kinesis), MLflow, Optuna, Kubernetes, Grafana, Kafka, ONNX Runtime Show less

results.title: Charter Communications AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Charter Communications has positioned itself as a leader in telecommunications AI adoption, with CEO Chris Winfrey predicting AI could reduce the company's $8 billion annual service cost within 12-18 months[1]. In November 2025, Charter established a strategic partnership with AWS, adopting GitLab Duo with Amazon Q Developer to transform its software development capabilities[2][3]. The company is implementing AI across customer service operations, including real-time call transcription, conversational prompting for AI agents, and automated call summaries through its proprietary Summary AI tool[4][5]. Beyond development, Charter is using AI-powered tools to enhance customer experience through its Spectrum Reach Architect platform for advertisers and AI-driven customer service recommendations[6][7].

AI-assisted development changes the economics of software development. The cost to build software is now low enough that the software no longer needs to have a large commercial market in order to justify the cost to build it. Software can exist for a single person. What kinds of things are you building for yourself? Bonus points if its weird 😉
...
After nearly 5 years on the Data Science team at Charter, I am leaving to pursue new opportunities. I'm so grateful to have had the experience to work with all of the fantastic and talented people at this company. This job has taught me how to work hard and to have pride in my work. I learned how to build products that provide real business value as well as the determination required to communicate that value to people of diverse backgrounds across all levels of the company. I want to say thank you to all of the people that believed in my wacky ideas and for the opportunity to build them. A special thank you to my team; I'll miss working with you, stay in touch.

# Software Engineer VII (Multiple Openings)
...
SeniorStaffBackend

Senior backend engineer building and maintaining Charter's Device Activation platform on AWS and on-premises infrastructure, with focus on API development, testing automation, and real-time system monitoring.
...
## Tech Stack
...
AWS Java Splunk Datadog Postman CI/CD Agile Microservices REST Monitoring Cloud Infrastructure Analytics Version Control API Dashboards JMeter
...
TITLE:Software Engineer VII (Multiple Openings)
...
JOB SUMMARY:Develop, modify, enhance and implement software systems designed to support business initiatives for Charter’s Device Activation platform. Create software solutions that use prevailing technologies and improve customer experience while adhering to business and technical requirements. Develop and implement technical solutions for applications hosted in Amazon Web Service (AWS) and On-Prem to support Mobile applications. Contribute to technical direction, execution, and support solutions deployed into production, including testing, automation, analytics, and instrumentation. Document, maintain, monitor, enhance, and troubleshoot systems. Analyze and document difficulties in existing system logic. Attend team and project meetings. Own technical decisions under pressure and tight time constraints. Establish a scope of work, implement, and maintain dashboards and alerting in Splunk and DataDog. Create and maintain relevant documentation. Contribute to the execution of proofs-of-concept for new approaches through current trends and technological innovations. Collaborate with leadership and key stakeholders to define and develop technology strategy, technology standards, roadmaps, and practices. Collaborate with business and technical teams to review conflicts/gaps between functional goals and existing capabilities. Adhere to best practices for code development, version control, continuous integration/delivery, and test/build automation. Define and evangelize mobile app and web technologies across the organization. Support API, front-end, and automated testing of software including Postman, SoapUI or Apache JMeter. Utilize Java 8, 9, or higher versions to develop and maintain Java-based applications including writing code, debugging, and troubleshooting. Identify automatable test scenarios, automation tools, and develop automation in Java. Utilize Agile development methodologies and implementing Agile model.
...
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Management Information Systems, Information Systems, or a related field. 6 years of experience in: API, front-end, and automated testing of software including Postman, SoapUI, or Apache JMeter; and using Java 8, 9, or higher to develop and maintain Java-based applications, including writing code, debugging, and troubleshooting. 4 years of experience: developing and maintaining Splunk dashboards, reports, and alerts to visualize data and support real-time system monitoring; and identifying automatable test scenarios, automation tools, and developing automation in Java. 1 year of experience in Agile development methodologies and implementing Agile model.
...
Get to Know Us Charter Communications provides superior communication and entertainment products for residential and business customers through the Spectrum brand. Our offerings include Spectrum Internet®, TV, Mobile and Voice. Beyond our connectivity solutions, we also provide local news, programming and regional sports via Spectrum Networks and multiscreen advertising solutions via Spectrum Reach. When you join our team, you’ll be keeping our customers connected to what matters most in 41 states across the U.S. Watch this video to learn more.

highlights:
Director Data Science at [Charter Communications](https://www.linkedin.com/company/charter-communications)
...
As a Director of Data Science at Charter Communications with over 10 years of experience, I specialize in credit risk management and predictive modeling. Leveraging machine learning techniques, our team reduced annual losses by over $37M and drove a $270M profit lift through P&L-backed credit strategy refinements. I manage a $7M+ customer portfolio, implementing data-driven policies that balance profitability and risk while embedding ML solutions into operational workflows to enhance efficiency in dynamic market conditions. Dedicated to advancing data science within financial decision-making, I have led cross-functional collaborations that unified teams and automated processes, sustaining performance across varied market dynamics. My mission is to translate complex analytics into actionable strategies that drive measurable business outcomes. By integrating predictive modeling and credit risk expertise, I empower organizations to achieve both financial and operational excellence.
...
Manage a portfolio of 7M+ new customers, overseeing credit policy from ideation, analysis, and value proposal to implementation. Applied machine learning techniques to identify high-risk segments, resulting in $37M+ in annual loss reduction. Drove a $270M profit lift by delivering P&L-backed credit strategy refinements. Unified data science and operations teams (30+), embedding ML into recoveries, automating workflows, and increasing efficiency by creating a fast feedback loop that sustained performance in dynamic market conditions. Show less
...
Established credit risk strategy for Mobile and Apple TV financing, directly advising the Head of Credit Risk. Spearheaded development and deployment of high-performing logistic models, capturing 75%+ of defaulters within the riskiest 30%, on par with credit bureau credit score. Delivered detailed model specs and led rigorous UAT to ensure seamless implementation. Cut $8M in annual losses by introducing credit scoring and predictive models that refined eligibility. Pioneered a dynamic, margin-based financing strategy tailored by risk tier, significantly enhancing portfolio profitability and risk-adjusted returns. Show less

# Lead Data Scientist – Generative AI (GenAI)
...
Lead Data Scientist – Generative AI (GenAI)
...
Experience: 12–15+ Years (Data Science / AI Experience)
...
We are seeking a highly accomplished Lead Data Scientist with strong Generative AI expertise to design and drive enterprise-scale AI solutions. The ideal candidate will have deep experience in machine learning, statistical modeling, Large Language Models (LLMs), and advanced analytics, along with strong leadership capabilities to guide teams and deliver impactful AI-driven products.
...
This role requires ownership of GenAI solution design, model development, experimentation, deployment, and performance optimization across enterprise environments.
...
- Key Responsibilities
- Define and lead GenAI and data science strategy across business use cases.
- Design and implement LLM-based applications including RAG architectures.
- Lead development of machine learning models and advanced analytics solutions.
- Perform deep exploratory data analysis (EDA) and derive actionable insights.
- Architect end-to-end ML pipelines (data ingestion → training → deployment → monitoring).
- Optimize models for accuracy, scalability, and cost efficiency.
- Collaborate with Data Engineers, ML Engineers, and Product stakeholders.
- Establish best practices for MLOps, model governance, and evaluation frameworks.
- Mentor junior data scientists and lead technical decision-making.
- Drive innovation in AI/ML and Generative AI solutions.
...
Required Technical Skills
...
- Data Science & ML
- Strong expertise in Machine Learning & Statistical Modeling
- Python (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn)
- Feature engineering, model evaluation, and tuning

- Generative AI
- LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, LLaMA, etc.)
- Prompt engineering and LLM orchestration
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
- LangChain / LlamaIndex / Hugging Face

- Data & Processing
- SQL
- Large-scale data handling and transformation

- Cloud & MLOps
- AWS / Azure / GCP
- MLflow / SageMaker / Azure ML
- CI/CD for ML pipelines
- Model deployment and monitoring

- Preferred Qualifications
- Experience with Deep Learning (TensorFlow / PyTorch)
- Exposure to vector databases (Pinecone, FAISS, Chroma)
- Experience with Databricks or big data platforms
- Strong leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills
...
- W2 Full-Time Only
- No C2C

- Data Scientist + ML Engineer (Gen AI)

In this role, you will be responsible for developing, fine-tuning, and applying advanced generative AI models - including diffusion models, large language models (LLMs), and other state-of-the-art architectures. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional partners in research, data engineering, and operations to deliver high-quality machine learning solutions and scalable datasets.

...

...

...

...

...

- 2+ years of experience in Machine Learning or Software Engineering
- Expert-level proficiency in Python and familiarity with deep learning frameworks such as PyTorch
...
